814 O0430_PTA_THRPY_DAYS_NUM O0430_PTA_THRPY_DAYS_NUM O0430 Distinct Calendar Days of Part A Therapy CHAR 3 Distinct calendar days of Part A therapy for at least 15 minutes during the SNF Part A stay. If a resident receives more than one therapy discipline on a given calendar day, this may only count for one calendar day. effective 10/01/2019
